extDescription.message: Add a Markdown copy button for ChatGPT responses

mdCopyButtonIdle.description: Default label and tooltip for the Markdown copy button

mdCopyButtonLoading.description: Aria label while Markdown content is being prepared

mdCopyButtonLoadingTooltip.description: Tooltip text while Markdown content is being prepared

mdCopyButtonSuccess.description: Success label and tooltip after copy

mdCopyButtonError.description: Error label and tooltip when copy fails
